creator: biscuits.carry.0j@icloud.com
text:
Both "14.1-RELEASE releng/14.1-n267679-10e31f0946d8 GENERIC amd64" and "14.2-PRERELEASE stable/14-n269296-5ae76ff5138e GENERIC amd64" kernels panic at the same point during startup on a system with a Chelsio T320 NIC installed, with two 10Gbase-SR SFP+ installed.

This crash appears to be triggered by something in the OPNSense 24.7 startup, but userspace doesn't appear to be doing anything unreasonable at the time.
